title: senecio helichrysoides
intro: Senecio helichrysoides, also known as annual cineraria, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family, Asteraceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's health benefits also include reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of the common cold. In herbal preparations, Senecio helichrysoides can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support respiratory health and relieve coughs.
